code:
%%{ init: { 'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#00d9ff' } } }%%

%% PoTicTac State Transition Diagram
%% Tracks the lifecycle of a game from start to end

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Menu: App Loaded
    
    state Menu {
        [*] --> NameEntry
        NameEntry --> ModeSelection: Name entered
        ModeSelection --> DifficultySelection: "Single Player" selected
        DifficultySelection --> ReadyToStart: Difficulty chosen
        ReadyToStart --> [*]: Click "Start Game"
    }
    
    Menu --> Playing: startSinglePlayerGame()
    
    state Playing {
        [*] --> PlayerTurn
        
        PlayerTurn --> ValidatingMove: Click cell
        ValidatingMove --> PlayerTurn: Invalid move (cell occupied)
        ValidatingMove --> CheckingWin: Valid move made
        
        CheckingWin --> PlayerWon: 4-in-a-row detected
        CheckingWin --> CheckingDraw: No winner
        
        CheckingDraw --> Draw: Board full
        CheckingDraw --> AIThinking: Board not full
        
        AIThinking --> AIMove: AI calculates move
        AIMove --> CheckingAIWin: AI places mark
        
        CheckingAIWin --> AIWon: 4-in-a-row detected
        CheckingAIWin --> CheckingAIDraw: No winner
        
        CheckingAIDraw --> Draw: Board full
        CheckingAIDraw --> PlayerTurn: Board not full
    }
    
    Playing --> GameOver: Game ends
    
    state GameOver {
        [*] --> DisplayResult
        DisplayResult --> SavingStats: Stats not saved yet
        SavingStats --> LocalSave: Save to LocalStorage
        LocalSave --> CloudSave: Attempt API save
        CloudSave --> StatsComplete: Success or offline fallback
        StatsComplete --> [*]
    }
    
    state GameResult <<choice>>
    GameOver --> GameResult
    GameResult --> PlayerWonState: Player won
    GameResult --> AIWonState: AI won
    GameResult --> DrawState: Draw
    
    state PlayerWonState {
        WinAnimation: Show winning cells
        WinMessage: "You Win! 🎉"
        UpdateStreak: Increment win streak
    }
    
    state AIWonState {
        LoseAnimation: Show AI winning cells
        LoseMessage: "AI Wins!"
        ResetStreak: Reset win streak to 0
    }
    
    state DrawState {
        DrawAnimation: Flash all cells
        DrawMessage: "It's a Draw!"
        KeepStreak: Maintain current streak
    }
    
    GameOver --> Menu: "Play Again" or "Back to Menu"
    
    note right of Playing
        Race Condition Prevention:
        - moveLockRef prevents double moves
        - isAiThinking blocks user input
        - statsSaved prevents double save
    end note
    
    note right of Menu
        State Persistence:
        - playerName → LocalStorage
        - difficulty → LocalStorage
        - Stats synced on game end
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为PoTicTac游戏设计一个完整的状态流转图，重点体现从App启动到游戏结束的完整生命周期。核心流程包括Menu菜单、Playing对局中和GameOver结算三大阶段。
明白了，三大主状态。Menu阶段需要细化吗？比如玩家进入App后是先输名字还是先选模式？
Menu要展开成子状态图。初始是NameEntry输入玩家名，然后到ModeSelection选择单双人模式。如果选了"Single Player"，进入DifficultySelection选难度，最后到ReadyToStart等待点击开始。
好的，Menu内部是NameEntry → ModeSelection → DifficultySelection → ReadyToStart的线性流程，ReadyToStart通过点击"Start Game"回到Menu的终态。那从Menu到Playing的触发条件是？
触发条件是startSinglePlayerGame()函数调用。Playing阶段比较复杂，需要处理玩家回合、AI回合、胜负判定和流局判定。
我建议Playing内部这样设计：从PlayerTurn开始，玩家点击格子触发ValidatingMove，如果是无效移动（cell occupied）就回到PlayerTurn，有效移动则到CheckingWin进行胜负检测。
对，CheckingWin如果检测到4-in-a-row就进入PlayerWon，否则到CheckingDraw判断流局。CheckingDraw发现board full就进入Draw，否则进入AIThinking让AI计算。
AIThinking之后是AIMove放置棋子，然后CheckingAIWin和CheckingAIDraw，逻辑和玩家侧对称对吧？CheckingAIDraw如果board not full要回到PlayerTurn形成循环。
完全正确。Playing结束后统一进入GameOver，GameOver内部先DisplayResult，然后SavingStats处理存档，支持LocalSave到localStorage和CloudSave云端同步。
GameOver之后我注意到有个分支结构，GameResult作为choice节点，根据结果分流到PlayerWonState、AIWonState或DrawState三个终态分支，每个都有各自的动画和消息处理。
是的，PlayerWonState要显示WinAnimation和WinMessage，并UpdateStreak增加连胜；AIWonState显示LoseAnimation和LoseMessage，ResetStreak清零；DrawState是DrawAnimation和DrawMessage，KeepStreak保持连胜。
GameOver结束后如何返回Menu？另外Playing阶段有什么需要注意的并发问题吗？
GameOver通过"Play Again"或"Back to Menu"返回Menu。Playing阶段确实需要加注释说明race condition防护：moveLockRef防止双击，isAiThinking阻断用户输入，statsSaved防止重复存档。
我可以在Playing右侧添加note说明race condition prevention。另外Menu阶段也有状态持久化需求吧？
对，在Menu右侧加另一个note，说明playerName和difficulty都存到LocalStorage，游戏结束时Stats synced on game end。

已完成状态图绘制。结构包含：Menu子状态图（NameEntry→ModeSelection→DifficultySelection→ReadyToStart）、Playing子状态图（玩家回合与AI回合的双向流转，含胜负和流局判定）、GameOver子状态图（DisplayResult→SavingStats→LocalSave→CloudSave→StatsComplete），以及GameResult choice分支到三个结果状态，并附加了两处技术注释。
